name: sales-call-intelligence
description: Extract objection patterns, buying signals, emotional arcs, golden moments, and personalized coaching from sales call transcripts. Enterprise-grade conversation intelligence without the enterprise price tag.
author: KOINO Capital

inputs: transcript text, VTT, SRT, or plain text

commands.analyze: Full single-call analysis with all 8 dimensions
commands.battlecard: Generate objection battle card from call patterns
commands.drill: Generate personalized practice scenarios from weaknesses

supported_formats: JSON with speaker labels and timestamps
